beIN SPORTS XTRA 2.desc_ar: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

beIN SPORTS XTRA 3.desc_ar: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

beIN 4K.title_en: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title_fr: Newcastle United contre Sunderland - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_ar: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. beIN 4K.title_en: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title_fr: Brighton & Hove Albion contre Liverpool - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_ar: Brighton have won two of their last three home league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-2 in this exact fixture last season. Following their 2-0 win at Anfield in December, Liverpool are looking to complete the league double over Brighton for the first time since 2019-20.
